structure.heading: Project Overview
structure.summary: **ChatGPT Workspace Blueprint** is a comprehensive architectural blueprint for building production-ready full-stack applications. It combines:
keyPoints: **Documentation-First Approach**: PRD templates, architecture guides, security implementation patterns
**TOON Integration**: Token-Oriented Object Notation system for AI agent optimization (60-85% token savings)
**Enterprise Compliance**: Structured audit logging, error categorization, security event tracking
**Best Practices**: Security checklist, development workflows, deployment guides

structure.heading: Key Technologies
keyPoints: **TOON Format**: Markdown-to-JSON converter for AI optimization
**Git**: Version control with branch naming conventions

structure.heading: TOON Configuration
structure.summary: Edit `.toon/config.json` to control which files are processed:

structure.heading: GitHub Actions Workflow
keyPoints: **Triggers**: Push/PR to main/develop branches with markdown changes
**Actions**: Auto-generates TOON files, commits with `[skip ci]`, posts PR comment

structure.heading: Issue: Git push fails with 403
structure.summary: **Cause**: Branch name doesn't match required format.

structure.heading: Issue: GitHub Actions detached HEAD
structure.summary: **Cause**: Workflow needs `ref` parameter in checkout action.

codeBlocks.code:
- name: Checkout repository
  uses: actions/checkout@v4
  with:
    ref: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}
    fetch-depth: 0

structure.heading: Issue: npm version command fails
structure.summary: **Cause**: `npm version` creates commit and tag automatically.

codeBlocks.code:
git add CHANGELOG.md
npm version minor -m "chore: release v%s"
git push origin main --tags
